No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to zero hunger.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops skills for future academic research and practical work (Target 4.4), aligning well with quality education.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students for 'practical work' (實務工作), which tangentially supports developing relevant skills for employment, aligning with Target 8.5.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course enhances 'scientific research' capabilities and the ability to 'independently complete the entire research process,' directly supporting Target 9.5 on innovation and R&D.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course teaches methods to 'deeply analyze various social phenomena' and fosters 'humanistic and social care,' which are crucial for understanding and addressing inequalities (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to sustainable cities and communities.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate action.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly covers 'The Ethics and Politics of Social Research' and 'ethical research,' directly supporting the development of accountable and transparent institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course directly builds capacity for 'statistical analysis' and 'data collection,' which is essential for high-quality data and statistical capacity-building (Targets 17.18, 17.19).
